title: Extra Select Premium Hygiene Cat Litter, 10 Litre
features: Low Dust: This virtually dust free cat litter is a simple solution that's easy on sensitive noses.
Non Clumping Cat Litter: Ultra clean fast absorption is great for clean paws and happy purrs.
Odour Control: For a smell free cat litter box, Extra Select helps your home stay fresh.
Lightweight: Easy to scoop, carry, and clean. A lifelong cat litter from kittens to adult cats.
Hygienic: Our no-tracking design keeps kitty litter fresh and in the tray with a natural solution.
description: From the manufacturer Extra Select - Hygiene Cat Litter What is Calcium Silicate Cat Litter? Calcium Silicate cat litter is the science-backed choice for effective odour control. Made from tiny, porous granules of calcium silicate, it acts like a sponge, rapidly absorbing liquids and locking away moisture. The result? A dry, comfortable litter box for your cat and reduced odours for your home. Plus, its non-clumping formula means less mess and easy clean-up. Why Cats Love It Cats crave cleanliness and calcium silicate cat litter delivers just that. Its highly absorbent nature ensures a dry, comfortable surface for your feline friend. The quick absorption and odour neutralising properties mean fewer lingering smells, making the litter box a more pleasant place. The Highlights Natural Materials: made from quartz sand & lime, naturally breaks down in landfill. Minimized Tracking: The fine granules minimize tracking, reducing litter box mess in your home. Suitable for All Cats: Its gentle, non-toxic formula makes it great for cats of all ages and breeds. Quick Absorption The fast absorption ensures a drier, cleaner litter tray. Calcium Silicate granules quickly soak up moisture, reducing tracking and keeping your home cleaner Odour Control Experience a fresher home with Extra Select Hygiene Cat Litter. Its calcium silicate granules trap and neutralise odours, maintaining a pleasant environment. Cost Effective Its super absorbency extends lifespan, reducing frequency of full litter changes. The calcium silicate base ensures less product is wasted, making a little go a long way.
